message.reasoning:
We need to respond JSON only, shape with kind, assistant_message, tool_call, acquired_fact_ids, readiness_state. Right now we are in a think step, need to take next action per recommended frontier: expand_file [F1] priority=112 candidates=17 via session.expand_file(...). So we must issue a tool_call of kind "tool_call" with tool_name "session.expand_file@v1" and payload containing target selector etc. We need to decide payload fields: target_selector probably something like "symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". The prior expansions used session.expand_file with target_selector. So we should call session.expand_file with appropriate selector.

We also need to fill acquired_fact_ids: maybe empty list since no facts yet. readiness_state likely "not_ready". assistant_message brief status.

Thus output JSON:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"Expanding file symbols for artifacts.rs",
  "tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1","payload":{"target_selector":"symbol:crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"}},
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"not_ready"
}

Make sure no extra fields. Ensure exact shape: {{"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{{}}}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}}. Actually format: it's a JSON with fields. Should be {"kind":"tool_call","assistant_message":"...","tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1","payload":{}},"acquired_fact_ids":[],"readiness_state":"not_ready"}.

Make sure quoting correct. No markdown. Provide JSON only.
